calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Reset To Aug-24-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioners: Yvette Detietge, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Franquois P. Hernandez, was swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Franquois Pierre Anderson.
